description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow enclosed by a brick perimeter wall, featuring a flat green roof with multiple levels and sections. The structure is primarily composed of reddish-brown brick with large rectangular windows and a prominent covered carport on one side. The front facade includes a series of arches forming a shaded veranda, while the property is landscaped with several trees and shrubs within the walled yard. The building has two above-ground stories, with the upper floor set back from the lower, creating a stepped appearance. The roofline is mostly flat, with some minor elevation changes and utility structures visible. The overall design is spacious, with a blend of open and enclosed outdoor areas, and a driveway leading to the carport.
description: A spacious, modern brick bungalow with a flat green roof, large windows, and a walled yard featuring trees and a carport. The design includes a shaded veranda with arches and a stepped two-story layout.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the bungalow with the main entrance, veranda arches, and landscaped yard visible.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the carport, driveway entrance, and the stepped arrangement of the upper and lower stories.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the bungalow, including the back yard, utility structures, and the flat roof's varying elevations.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a look at the side and rear, emphasizing the brick perimeter wall, greenery, and the setback of the upper story.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
